person.name: John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst

nameForms.fullText: John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Biography
Sir John de Bohun was born circa 1247 in Sussex, England; Age 26 in 1273.

20 October 1273 did homage and had livery of lands in England of his father and mother. On 3 March 1273/74 had livery of lands of mother in Ireland. Lived at Ford, Sussex, Eng. Lived at Midhurst, Sussex, Eng. Sealer of Writs for King Edward.

He fought in Wales in 1277 and 1283.

Sir John de Bohun died on 28 September 1284 at Midhurst, Ford, & Rustington, Sussex, England.

He married Joan de la Chapelle, daughter of Bartholomew de la Chapelle and Nichole, before 1275
and had the following Children:
1.) John de Bohun, Lord of Midhurst, b. 2 Jun 1275, born in Midhurst, Sussex, England d. 1297

2.) James de Bohun, Lord of Ballymadden, b. 3 Feb 1281, of , Midhurst, Sussex, England d. 1306

3.) Richard de Bohun, d. Aft Jun 1332

4.) Joan de Bohun

5.) Sybil de Bohun

zh.of, Midhurst, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可米度爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst於1247年出生在英國素可米度爾斯特時，他的父親Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst24歲，母親Sybil de Ferrers17歲。他和Joan Chapelle至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1284年9月28日在英國英格蘭享年37歲。

zh-hans.of, Midhurst, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可米度爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst于1247年出生在英国素可米度爾斯特时，他的父亲Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst24岁，母亲Sybil de Ferrers17岁。他和Joan Chapelle至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1284年9月28日在英国英格兰享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slovak (Behúň) and Rusyn (from Slovakia; also Behún): nickname from Slovak behúň (Rusyn bihun) ‘fast runner’.
Irish: from Ó Beachain or Ó Beathain, see Behan . This form of the surname is almost extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Behan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Conan, Aileen.
Irish (southern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beachain ‘descendant of Beachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of beach ‘bee’.
Irish (southern): perhaps from Ó Beathain ‘descendant of Beathán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of beatha ‘life’. Compare Bean 5 and McBeth .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst was born in 1247, in Midhurst, Sussex, England, his father, Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst, was 24 and his mother, Sybil de Ferrers, was 17. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Joan Chapelle. He died on 28 September 1284, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst est né en 1247, à Midhurst, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Ferrers, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Joan Chapelle. Il est décédé le 28 septembre 1284, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst 1247 in Midhurst, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst 24 und seine Mutter Sybil de Ferrers 17. Er hatte mit Joan Chapelle mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 28. September 1284 im Alter von 37 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst è nato il nel 1247 nel Midhurst, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Sybil de Ferrers, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Joan Chapelle. Morì il 28 settembre 1284, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Bohun Lord of Midhurstが1247年にイギリススセックスミドハルストで生まれた時，父Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurstは24歳，母Sybil de Ferrersは17歳であった。彼はJoan Chapelleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1284年9月28日にイギリスイギリスで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst(이)가 1247년 영국 수세스 미드후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil de Ferrers(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Joan Chapelle(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1284년 9월 28일 영국 잉글랜드에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst nasceu em 1247, em Midhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Ferrers, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Joan Chapelle. Ele faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1284, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst родился в 1247 г. в местности мидхурст, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Ferrers, 17. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Joan Chapelle. Он умер 28 сентября 1284 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst nació en 1247, en Midhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Francis de Bohun Lord of Midhurst, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Sybil de Ferrers, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Joan Chapelle. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1284, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años.
